## Describe your changes

Please describe the changes you are proposing and the problem they solve.

## Issue ticket number and link

Link to the original issue tracker (e.g. `Fixes #123`)

## Checklist before requesting a review

- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project (run `npm run format` and `go fmt ./...`).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing unit and integration tests pass locally.
